Your BVI Destination Management Company


Welcome to BVI Travel

get in touch with us

 

Home to some of the wealthiest in the world, the British Virgin Islands is the perfect destination for all escapists – whether it’s a barefoot luxury experience you’re looking for or perhaps an off the beaten path trip for those of you who prefer to travel solo. The British Virgin Islands has it all – it’s easy to see why this was a popular playground for the pirates!   

Sailing, Snorkelling, Diving, Watersports, visiting Necker Island on a glass bottom boat (yep, it’s possible if you book with us!) are just some of the magnificent activities you can expect during your vacation with the added bonus that the territory is known to be one of the safest locations in the Caribbean. Heading up to Nail Bay and watching the whole sky twinkle from the abundance of stars – there really is no place in the world that will charm you the same way the BVI will.

On your departure, you will be overwhelmed with a feeling that you’re leaving a part of your home behind, everytime. Trust us – if there’s one thing you should add to your bucket list – it’s The British Virgin Islands. 

What are you waiting for?

see what our customers say

THANK YOU BVI TRAVEL!!!

A huge thank you to BVI Travel for helping us plan our holiday. We had such an incredible time and can’t believe it’s taken us so long to discover the beauty that lies in Virgin Islands. Booking with you guys was awesome you made it so easy. Thank you so much – we couldn’t have done it without your help. P.S. Make sure to check out Mad Dogs if you’re on Virgin Gorda –  a MUST for lunch after a visit to the Baths.

As the only certified BVI Specialist in the UK, when booking with us you also have the added benefit of ATOL and ABTA protection. Want to hear more?

The only place to book your trip to the BVI!

WOW. From start to finish, we had a fantastic holiday to the British Virgin Islands. Having originally planned to stay on Tortola and do day trips to the other islands, we are so glad we found the team at BVI Travel! They put together an itinerary for us that was truly tailor-made to our family – so much so that they knew what we were looking for before even we did! Fantastic. If we’re lucky enough to return to the BVIs we will absolutely be booking with BVI Travel again. Highly recommend!

How to get to the BVI

Both British Airways and Virgin fly direct from London Gatwick to Antigua – from there, it’s just a quick (& very scenic) 45 min flight to the territories main island, Tortola. If you decide to continue on to one of the other islands such as Virgin Gorda or Anegada, there are ferries which run throughout the day direct from Beef Island. Sounds simple enough, right? What are you waiting for? It’s only a 9 hour journey!

Get in touch with us today and let us find the most convenient route for you, wherever you are. 

BEEF ISLAND

Beef Island (EIS) is a small airport with not much going on, but you will find plenty of taxis and shuttle services to the ferry terminal just a few minutes drive away. If you have a bit of time to spare until the ferry departure, be sure to check out Trellis Bay whilst you wait. The Sushi is amazing!

VIRGIN GORDA

Virgin Gorda (VIJ) is a great option for those of you coming from Miami/Puerto Rico and planning to experience the more luxurious resorts of the BVI such as Necker Island and Little Dix Bay. Flights also arrive here from other neighbouring islands including St Thomas, Sint Maarten, Anegada and even Beef Island if you really can’t stomach the 30 minute ferry.

ST THOMAS

St Thomas (STT) located in the US Virgin Islands (yes – you will need an ESTA..) is another option travelling from London Heathrow with one stop in the US usually New York, Miami or Philadelphia. Flight time is a little longer at around 13 hours, but often the deals are better. Once in STT it’s just a short ferry ride across to the British side of the Virgin Islands. Easy, no?
